H3, H6) A MEDTRONIC REPRESENTATIVE WENT TO THE SITE TO TEST THE EQUIPMENT. IT WAS NOTED THAT THE MACHINE TURNED ON AND BOOTED INTO STAND ALONE MODE, INDICATING A MOTION CALIBRATION WAS NEEDED. THE MANUFACTURER REPRESENTATIVE ATTEMPTED TO OPEN THE DOOR AND IT WOULD NOT OPEN. THE MANUFACTURER REPRESENTATIVE CALIBRATED THE MOTION AND WAS THEN UNABLE TO DUPLICATE THE ISSUE OPENING THE DOOR OUTSIDE OF THE SYSTEM BOOTING INTO STAND ALONE MODE NEEDING A MOTION CALIBRATION, IN WHICH CASE THE DOOR SHOULD NOT OPEN. THE MANUFACTURER REPRESENTATIVE SPOKE WITH THE CUSTOMER AND IT WAS NOTED THAT THEY DID NOT RECALL A MESSAGE ON THE PENDANT OR ANYTHING ON THE PENDANT. THE SYSTEM THEN PASSED A SYSTEM CHECKOUT.
